title: Lacrosse Scoreboard Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Lacrosse Scoreboard plugin (NCAA Men's and Women's Lacrosse)

enabled.description: Enable or disable the lacrosse scoreboard plugin

defaults.description: Default settings that can be inherited by leagues (can be overridden per league)

display_duration.description: Default duration in seconds to display each game

show_records.description: Default setting to show team records (wins-losses)

show_ranking.description: Default setting to show team rankings (when available)

show_odds.description: Default setting to show betting odds for games

update_interval_seconds.description: Default base update interval in seconds for fetching game data

season_cache_duration_seconds.description: How long to cache season data (seconds)

show_shots.title: Show shot totals
show_shots.description: Display shot totals when available from ESPN

display_modes.title: Display Modes
display_modes.description: Control which game types to show and how they are displayed

live.description: Show NCAA Men's Lacrosse live games

live_display_mode.description: Display mode for live games: 'switch' shows one game at a time, 'scroll' scrolls all games horizontally

recent.description: Show NCAA Men's Lacrosse recent games

recent_display_mode.description: Display mode for recent games: 'switch' shows one game at a time, 'scroll' scrolls all games horizontally

upcoming.description: Show NCAA Men's Lacrosse upcoming games

upcoming_display_mode.description: Display mode for upcoming games: 'switch' shows one game at a time, 'scroll' scrolls all games horizontally

scroll_settings.title: Scroll Settings
scroll_settings.description: Settings for scroll display mode (when display mode is set to 'scroll')

scroll_speed.description: Scroll speed in pixels per second (default: 50). Higher values scroll faster.

scroll_delay.description: Delay between scroll frames in seconds (default: 0.01 = 100 FPS). Lower values = smoother scrolling.

gap_between_games.description: Gap in pixels between game cards when scrolling

show_league_separators.description: Show league icons ( shield, NCAA logos) between different leagues

dynamic_duration.description: Automatically calculate display duration based on content width

game_card_width.description: Width of each game card in scroll mode (pixels). Default 128. Set lower on multi-panel chains to show more games simultaneously.

favorite_teams.description: NCAA Men's Lacrosse favorite team abbreviations (e.g., ['BU', 'BC', 'MICH'])

favorite_teams_only.description: Only show NCAA Men's Lacrosse games with favorite teams

show_all_live.description: Show all live NCAA Men's Lacrosse games, not just favorites

recent_games_to_show.description: With favorites: N games per favorite team. Without favorites: N total games sorted by time.

upcoming_games_to_show.description: With favorites: N games per favorite team. Without favorites: N total games sorted by time.

base.description: Base update interval for NCAA Men's Lacrosse data

live.description: Update interval for live NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

recent.description: Update interval for recent NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

upcoming.description: Update interval for upcoming NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

odds.description: Update interval for NCAA Men's Lacrosse betting odds data

display_durations.description: How long to display games on screen (in seconds)

base.description: Base display duration for NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

live.description: Display duration for live NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

recent.description: Display duration for recent NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

upcoming.description: Display duration for upcoming NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

display_options.description: What information to display on the scoreboard

show_records.description: Show NCAA Men's Lacrosse team records (wins-losses)

show_ranking.description: Show NCAA Men's Lacrosse team rankings/standings

show_odds.description: Show betting odds for NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

show_shots.title: Show shot totals
show_shots.description: Display shot totals when available from ESPN

mode_durations.title: Mode-Level Durations
mode_durations.description: Control total duration for each mode type for NCAA Men's Lacrosse. If not set, uses dynamic calculation (total_games × per_game_duration).

recent_mode_duration.description: Total duration in seconds for Recent mode before rotating to next mode. Default: null (uses dynamic calculation). Set to null to use dynamic calculation. When mode cycles back, continues from last game shown (no repetition).

upcoming_mode_duration.description: Total duration in seconds for Upcoming mode before rotating to next mode. Default: null (uses dynamic calculation). Set to null to use dynamic calculation. When mode cycles back, continues from last game shown (no repetition).

live_mode_duration.description: Total duration in seconds for Live mode before rotating to next mode. Default: null (uses dynamic calculation). Set to null to use dynamic calculation. When mode cycles back, continues from last game shown (no repetition).

live_priority.description: Prioritize live NCAA Men's Lacrosse games over scheduled games

dynamic_duration.description: Dynamic duration settings - automatically adjust display time based on content

enabled.description: Enable dynamic duration for NCAA Men's Lacrosse games

max_duration_seconds.description: Maximum duration in seconds when dynamic duration is enabled

enabled.description: Enable dynamic duration for NCAA Men's Lacrosse live games

max_duration_seconds.description: Maximum duration for NCAA Men's Lacrosse live games

enabled.description: Enable dynamic duration for NCAA Men's Lacrosse recent games

max_duration_seconds.description: Maximum duration for NCAA Men's Lacrosse recent games

enabled.description: Enable dynamic duration for NCAA Men's Lacrosse upcoming games

max_duration_seconds.description: Maximum duration for NCAA Men's Lacrosse upcoming games

display_modes.description: Control which game types to show and how they are displayed

live.description: Show NCAA Women's Lacrosse live games

live_display_mode.description: Display mode for live games: 'switch' shows one game at a time, 'scroll' scrolls all games horizontally

recent.description: Show NCAA Women's Lacrosse recent games

recent_display_mode.description: Display mode for recent games: 'switch' shows one game at a time, 'scroll' scrolls all games horizontally

upcoming.description: Show NCAA Women's Lacrosse upcoming games

upcoming_display_mode.description: Display mode for upcoming games: 'switch' shows one game at a time, 'scroll' scrolls all games horizontally

customization.title: Display Customization
customization.description: Customize fonts for different text elements on the scoreboard

score_text.title: Game Score
score_text.description: Font settings for the game score display

font.title: Font Family
font.description: Select the font to use for scores (only TTF fonts supported)

period_text.title: Period/Clock
period_text.description: Font settings for period, clock, and time remaining text

font.title: Font Family
font.description: Select the font to use (only TTF fonts supported)

team_name.title: Team Names
team_name.description: Font settings for team name abbreviations

font.title: Font Family
font.description: Select the font to use (only TTF fonts supported)

status_text.title: Status Messages
status_text.description: Font settings for status text (e.g., 'Next Game', 'Final')

font.title: Font Family
font.description: Select the font to use (only TTF fonts supported)

detail_text.title: Details/Odds
detail_text.description: Font settings for odds and other detail information

font.title: Font Family
font.description: Select the font to use (only TTF fonts supported)

font.title: Font Family
font.description: Select the font to use (only TTF fonts supported)

layout.title: Layout Positioning
layout.description: Adjust X,Y coordinate offsets for elements. Values are relative to default positions. Use negative values to move left/up, positive to move right/down.

away_x_offset.description: Away team record horizontal offset from left (default: 0)

home_x_offset.description: Home team record horizontal offset from right (default: 0)
